mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_consultation WHERE deleted = 0
AND (patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR doctor_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR diagnosis LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, registration_id, patient_id, patient_name, doctor_name, department_name, visit_type, chief_complaint, diagnosis, doctor_advice, vital_signs, medical_record, prescription, check_items, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_consultation WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, registration_id, patient_id, patient_name, doctor_name, department_name, visit_type, chief_complaint, diagnosis, doctor_advice, vital_signs, medical_record, prescription, check_items, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_consultation WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_consultation (registration_id, patient_id, patient_name, doctor_name, department_name, visit_type, chief_complaint, diagnosis, doctor_advice, vital_signs, medical_record, prescription, check_items, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{registrationId}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{doctorName}, #{departmentName}, #{visitType}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{diagnosis}, #{doctorAdvice}, #{vitalSigns}, #{medicalRecord}, #{prescription}, #{checkItems}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_consultation
registration_id = #{registrationId}, patient_id = #{patientId}, patient_name = #{patientName}, doctor_name = #{doctorName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, visit_type = #{visitType}, chief_complaint = #{chiefComplaint}, diagnosis = #{diagnosis}, doctor_advice = #{doctorAdvice}, vital_signs = #{vitalSigns}, medical_record = #{medicalRecord}, prescription = #{prescription}, check_items = #{checkItems}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
